title: JDK's Mining Utilities 2
description: This mod adds mining stuff to your game, such as hammers, drills and more
body:
### JDK's Mining Utilities is a mnod that adds mining stuff to your game, such as hammers, drills and mining guns

**_Required [JDK's Utilities Core 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/jdk-core) v1.0c_**

**You can see all the content below ⏬**

**- Tools**
> Hammers (3x3 area)
 - Soularium Hammer
 - Enriched Soularium Hammer
> Drills
 - Soularium Drill
 - Enriched Soularium Drill
> Mining GunNs
 - Soularium Mining GunN
 - Enriched Soularium Mining GunNs

**- Blocks**
> Compact Haste Beacon
  
**(Free use for modpacks)**
